name: Mystic Star Strike
description: Mystic Star Strike is a fortune telling counterpart of Star Strike for Skylanders: Lost Islands.
biography: Mystic Star Strike is a fortune telling counterpart of Star Strike for Skylanders: Lost Islands.
quote: Mystic Star Strike is here to unravel the mysteries of Skylands!

story.content: Mystic Star Strike is a fortune telling counterpart of Star Strike for Skylanders: Lost Islands.

content: Mystic Star Strike is here to unravel the mysteries of Skylands!

trivia: She is the third female Lost Islands exclusive, the first being Skeletal Cynder, the second being Snowler Brawl and the fourth being Hallows' Eve Hex.
She is also the only Lost Islands exclusive female that is not an Undead element character.
